hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); case "$FILE" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.css|*.json) npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null;; esac; exit 0

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); case "$FILE" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) HITS=$(grep -n 'console\.log' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$HITS" ]; then echo "WARNING: console.log detected in $FILE:" >&2; echo "$HITS" >&2; fi;; esac; exit 0
FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); case "$FILE" in *.ts|*.tsx) npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | head -20 >&2; exit 0;; esac; exit 0

bash -c 'if git diff --stat --exit-code > /dev/null 2>&1 && git diff --cached --stat --exit-code > /dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; else echo "WARNING: You have uncommitted changes:" >&2; git status --short >&2; exit 0; fi'

bash -c 'STATE=".claude/work/state.md"; if [ -f "$STATE" ]; then echo "PRE-COMPACT: state.md exists — context will be preserved via disk handoff." >&2; else echo "PRE-COMPACT: No state.md found. If mid-task, consider running /execute to checkpoint progress." >&2; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'COMMAND=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -qE "git push.*(main|master)"; then echo "BLOCKED: Never push directly to main. Use a feature branch and create a PR." >&2; exit 2; fi'

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); case "$FILE" in *.md) if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(CLAUDE\.md|README\.md|[\\/]\.claude[\\/]|[\\/]docs[\\/]|[\\/]\.planning[\\/]|MEMORY\.md)'; then exit 0; else echo 'BLOCKED: Do not create .md files outside docs/, .claude/, or .planning/. Ask the user first.' >&2; exit 2; fi;; esac; exit 0
